hero.title: Create your submissions in
hero.subtitle: BuilderAI is your intelligent assistant for creating professional submissions. Import your plans, chat with AI, and generate complete documents automatically.

features.title: Everything you need for your submissions
features.subtitle: A complete platform to simplify and accelerate your submission process

ai.title: Conversational AI assistant
ai.description: Chat naturally with AI to extract information from your plans and define project specifications.

import.title: PDF plan import
import.description: Upload your architectural plans and AI automatically analyzes them to extract dimensions and details.

generation.title: Automatic generation
generation.description: Generate complete submissions in Excel or PDF format in one click, ready to send to your clients.

tracking.title: Project tracking
tracking.description: Manage all your submission projects from a centralized dashboard with status tracking.

collaboration.title: Team collaboration
collaboration.description: Invite colleagues to collaborate on projects with role and permission management.

security.title: Secure data
security.description: Your plans and data are protected with enterprise-level encryption.

howItWorks.title: How does it work?
howItWorks.subtitle: Three simple steps to create your professional submissions

step1.title: Import your plans
step1.description: Upload your PDF plans or images. Our AI analyzes them and automatically extracts key information.

step2.title: Chat with the assistant
step2.description: Refine the details with our AI assistant. It asks the right questions and understands your specifications.

step3.title: Generate the submission
step3.description: In one click, get a complete submission in Excel or PDF format, ready to send to your client.

pricing.title: Choose your plan
pricing.subtitle: Simple and transparent pricing for all contractors

testimonials.title: What our clients say
testimonials.subtitle: Hundreds of contractors already trust BuilderAI

cta.title: Ready to transform your submissions?
cta.subtitle: Start your free 7-day trial today. No credit card required.

footer.description: The AI platform for construction contractors who want to save time on their submissions.
